news.summary: In the first quarter of 2025, there was a significant 28% rise in net revenue compared to the previous year. When considering constant currency rates, the net revenue growth was even higher at 33% year-over-year.
news.headline: Cronos Group's Q1 2025 net revenue rose by 28% YoY, 33% growth in constant currency.

news.summary: On May 8, 2025, Palvella Therapeutics, Inc. (Nasdaq: PVLA) based in Wayne, announced that it is a clinical-stage biopharmaceutical company dedicated to creating and marketing innovative treatments for individuals with severe, rare genetic skin conditions lacking FDA-approved therapies. The company shared plans to disclose its financial performance for the first quarter of 2025 on May 15, 2025.
news.headline: Palvella Therapeutics to report Q1 2025 financial results on May 15, 2025, targeting rare genetic skin diseases.

news.summary: Results for the first quarter of 2025 have been disclosed by Kelly, a prominent specialty talent solutions provider based in Troy, Michigan. The company, listed on Nasdaq under the tickers KELYA and KELYB, released this information on May 8, 2025.
news.headline: Kelly, a talent solutions provider, releases Q1 2025 earnings in Troy, reporting growth in revenue and profit.

news.summary: In May 2025, Dyne held a Type C meeting with the FDA's Center for Drug Evaluation and Research (CDER) regarding DYNE-101 for DM1. Dyne intends to offer a regulatory update subsequent to reviewing the meeting minutes.
news.headline: Dyne Therapeutics reports Q1 2025 financial results and business highlights, including FDA meeting for DYNE-101 in DM1.

news.summary: In Laval, Quebec on May 8, 2025, Savaria Corporation (TSX:SIS), a renowned company in the accessibility sector, has successfully acquired Western Elevator Ltd. of Coquitlam, British Columbia. Western Elevator Ltd. is a top dealer of home elevators and lifts.
news.headline: Savaria acquires Western Elevator Ltd, a top home elevator dealer in Coquitlam, BC, on May 8, 2025 (TSX:SIS).

news.summary: Relmada Therapeutics, a biotechnology company traded on Nasdaq under the ticker RLMD, located in Coral Gables, Florida, revealed intentions to hold a conference call and webcast scheduled for May 12, 2025, at 4:30 PM Eastern Time. The purpose of this event is to present financial outcomes for the initial quarter concluding on March 31, 2025, and elaborate on the recent advancements made in their business operations.
news.headline: Relmada Therapeutics to discuss Q1 2025 financial results on May 12 at 4:30 PM ET. Nasdaq: RLMD. Business progress update.

news.summary: In Vancouver, British Columbia, Mogo Inc. (NASDAQ: MOGO) (TSX: MOGO) revealed its financial and operational performance for the quarter ending on March 31, 2025. The company, specializing in digital wealth and payments services, experienced significant growth in both sectors during the first quarter. Greg Feller, the Chief Financial Officer of Mogo, emphasized the continuous strong double-digit growth achieved by the Wealth and Payments divisions, which are the primary areas of focus for the company. These results indicate promising progress considering the existing market presence of Mogo within these segments.
news.headline: Mogo Inc. reported Q1 2025 results - strong double-digit growth in Wealth and Payments businesses. CFO pleased with performance.

news.summary: On May 8, 2025, in Shanghai, China, Dada Nexus Limited (NASDAQ: DADA) disclosed an extraordinary general meeting of shareholders (EGM) scheduled for June 10, 2025, at 10 a.m. (Beijing time) at No. 76 Zhichun Road, Haidian District, Beijing, China. The focal point of the EGM will be voting on the Agreement and Plan of Merger dated April 1, 2025, involving Dada, JD Sunflower Investment Limited (“Parent”), and JD Sunflower Merger Sub Limited. The plan of merger and related transactions, including the merger itself, will be on the agenda for authorization and approval.
news.headline: Dada Nexus will hold a meeting on June 10, 2025, to vote on the merger agreement with JD Sunflower, at No. 76 Zhichun Road, Beijing.
Outcome of Annual General Meeting revealed: key decisions taken, including approval of financial statements and election of new board members.
CHINA'S XI: HELD 'IN-DEPTH, FRIENDLY AND FRUITFUL' TALKS WITH PRESIDENT PUTIN

news.summary: In Phoenix, Cognite, a prominent company in industrial AI, has recently appointed Torgrim Aas, Jan Eivind Danielsen, and Thorkild Stray as the first Cognite Fellows. This move highlights Cognite's dedication to providing advanced industrial Data and AI solutions to customers and developing long-lasting expertise. Aas, Danielsen, and Stray are at the forefront of innovation in Industrial Data and AI. This step signifies a significant commitment to enhancing industrial processes through these technologies.
news.headline: Cognite appoints Torgrim Aas, Jan Eivind Danielsen, and Thorkild Stray as inaugural Cognite Fellows in industrial AI.

news.summary: MyStake is highlighted as a top betting site in Australia, providing an easy-to-use platform with a wide range of features. It offers a 120% match bonus up to $600 for new users. The site is licensed, transparent, and secure, catering to both sports bettors and casino players. MyStake stands out for its versatility, offering competitive odds on various markets for sports and a wide collection of casino games. The platform also provides live betting options, multi-bet slips, and strong security measures like encryption. Noteworthy aspects include the generous welcome bonus, extensive betting markets, live betting options, user-friendly interface, secure transactions, casino integration, fast payouts, and 24/7 customer support.
news.headline: MyStake named best betting site in Australia, offering 120% match bonus up to $600, diverse betting markets, and secure interface.

news.summary: Aktia Bank Plc announced on May 8, 2025, that they have been notified in adherence to Chapter 9, Section 5 of the Finnish Securities Markets Act by Erkki Etola regarding the holding of Etola Group Oy. The notification involves important details about changes in shareholding within the company.
news.headline: Aktia Bank Plc received notification from Erkki Etola regarding his holding in Etola Group Oy under Finnish Securities Markets Act.

news.summary: Last week, the Federal Reserve announced that it would keep interest rates unchanged at a range of 0.25% to 0.50%. This decision was made in light of the current economic conditions, including a lower than expected inflation rate of 1.2% and a steady unemployment rate of 4.1%. The Fed also noted that it will continue its bond-buying program at a pace of $120 billion per month to support the economy. This news comes amid concerns about rising COVID-19 cases and the potential impact on the recovery. Overall, the Federal Reserve's decision reflects its cautious approach to monetary policy amidst ongoing uncertainties.
news.headline: Trump claims UK trade deal is 'comprehensive' in Bloomberg report.

news.summary: In Victoria, Seychelles, on May 8, 2025, KuCoin, a prominent player in the cryptocurrency exchange sphere, revealed a vital collaboration between KuCoin Pay, its in-house crypto payment system, and WLTG (We Love This Game), the pioneering AI Celebrity Digital Twin initiative.
news.headline: KuCoin Pay partners with WLTG to bring joy and generosity to fans worldwide, funded by Patrice Evra.

news.summary: In a recent report, it was revealed that the unemployment rate in the country has dropped to a record low of 3.8%. This decrease represents a significant improvement in the job market, with over 250,000 new jobs being created in the last month alone. The economy is showing signs of growth, with the stock market reaching an all-time high and the GDP increasing by 3.5% in the last quarter. Analysts predict that this positive trend is likely to continue in the coming months, leading to further advancements in the labor market. This news comes as a welcome relief to many individuals who have been struggling to find employment opportunities.
news.headline: Vital Farms' Q1 2025 financial results released.
Money markets price 59 BPS of BoE rate cuts by year-end.

news.summary: A mining company based in Toronto, Silver Storm Mining Ltd. (TSX.V: SVRS | OTC: SVRSF | FSE: SVR), has announced significant advancements in obtaining funding for resuming operations at the former La Parrilla Silver Mine Complex in Durango, Mexico. The Company has garnered numerous non-binding offers from top trading houses for extended contracts for lead and zinc concentrates production. This progress marks a crucial step forward in the company's efforts to secure debt and project financing for the relaunch of operations at La Parrilla.
news.headline: Silver Storm secures financing for La Parrilla Silver Mine restart in Mexico, receives proposals for offtake-linked project financing.
UKRAINIAN PARLIAMENT RATIFIES RESOURCES DEAL WITH US

news.summary: The Head of Digital Assets Research at Standard Chartered, Geoffrey Kendrick, now believes that Bitcoin (CRYPTO: BTC) could exceed his previous forecast of $120,000 for the second quarter. He admitted that this estimate might have been too conservative, attributing this change in outlook to increasing inflows into U.S. spot Bitcoin ETFs, institutional buying, and a shift in global investor sentiment. Kendrick expressed in a note to clients that the dominant narrative surrounding Bitcoin has evolved significantly, leading to a more optimistic perspective on its future performance.
news.headline: Bitcoin's $120k price target may be too low, says Standard Chartered; expecting a quicker surge due to factors like ETF inflows.
Ukraine parliament ratifies U.S.-Ukraine minerals deal

news.summary: The 2025 Biz2Credit Top Cities for Small Business Study has declared Worcester, MA the best city for small businesses, with Ventura, CA, Stamford, CT, Portland, OR, and San Jose, CA rounding up the top five. The study evaluated various financial indicators of businesses that sought funding with Biz2Credit in 2024, noting a rise in average revenue but a slight dip in credit scores (from 652 to 647). The main industries in these cities are retail trade, construction, healthcare & social assistance, and accommodation and food services. Of the top 25 cities, seven are new entrants, including Worcester and Buffalo, NY, while eight cities from the 2024 list have dropped off. California's tech-heavy bay area has lost its top spots in this year's ranking compared to the previous year.
news.headline: Worcester, MA tops Biz2Credit's 2025 ranking of small business cities. Average credit score dipped by 5 points to 647.
PAKISTAN FOREIGN MINISTER TO REUTERS: THERE HAVE BEEN CONTACTS BETWEEN THE OFFICES OF NATIONAL SECURITY ADVISERS OF PAKISTAN AND INDIA

news.summary: In the first quarter of this year, there was a 3% year-over-year decrease in revenue, but there was a 6% year-over-year growth in net revenue. Excluding advocacy, the net revenue growth year-over-year was at 9%. Additionally, there was a significant growth of 15% in digital transformation net revenue excluding advocacy. During this period, there was a net loss attributable to Stagwell Inc. common shareholders amounting to $3 million. However, the adjusted EBITDA for the first quarter stood at $81 million.
news.headline: Stagwell Inc. (NASDAQ: STGW) reports Q1 net loss of $3M, but sees 6% YoY net revenue growth and $81M adjusted EBITDA.

news.summary: On May 8, 2025, in Lausanne, Switzerland, ADC Therapeutics SA, a prominent company specializing in antibody drug conjugates, revealed plans to conduct a conference call and live webcast on May 14, 2025, at 8:30 a.m. The company, listed on NYSE as ADCT, is recognized as a global leader in the field and is at a commercial-stage in its operations. This event serves as an opportunity for stakeholders to engage and learn more about the latest updates and advancements in ADC Therapeutics SA.
news.headline: ADC Therapeutics will host Q1 2025 financial results conference call on May 14, 2025, at 8:30 a.m. NYSE: ADCT.

news.summary: Today, Royalty Pharma plc (Nasdaq: RPRX) announced their financial results for the first quarter of 2025 in New York. The company reported a positive performance and, as a result, has increased its guidance for Portfolio Receipts for the full year 2025. This adjustment indicates a prosperous outlook for the company moving forward.
news.headline: Royalty Pharma plc (Nasdaq: RPRX) reports Q1 2025 results, raises full year guidance for 2025 Portfolio Receipts.

news.summary: In San Francisco, Kirsten Rhodes has been announced as the 2025 Financial Woman of the Year by the Financial Women of San Francisco (FWSF). Rhodes, employed at Deloitte*, holds the position of vice chair of client relationship development and serves as a principal in technology, media, and telecom. Bringing over 30 years of expertise in finance and technology, she plays a vital role in spearheading Deloitte's client relationship strategy aimed at fostering business expansion and achieving success.
news.headline: Kirsten Rhodes of Deloitte named 2025 FWSF Financial Woman of the Year in San Francisco. Over 30 years of experience.

news.summary: In Perth, Scotland, Fintech company Miconex has expanded its digital gifting product into Canada through a partnership with EML Payments. With a proven track record in Europe, Miconex manages over 200 closed loop gift card programs worldwide, facilitating nearly $60 million in local spending. Their successful Downtown Gift Card initiative is currently operational in North America, comprising 42 district branded programs that have generated over $15 million in sales in Canada alone. These local gift cards provide downtown areas with opportunities to benefit from the economic impact of consumer spending.
news.headline: Miconex and EML partner to launch digital gift card tech in Canada, $60M in global spend, $15M sales in Canada.

🔴 Traders pare BoE rate-cut bets and favour just two more this year.

news.summary: Clothing company HanesBrands Inc. (NYSE: HBI) based in Winston-Salem, N.C., reported its first-quarter 2025 results, with CEO Steve Bratspies noting exceeding expectations in revenue, operating profit, and earnings per share. The company's growth strategy and past transformation initiatives were credited for the positive outcomes. The full-year outlook was reiterated by the CEO. Specific numbers were not disclosed in the provided information.
news.headline: HanesBrands Inc. reports strong first-quarter 2025 results; revenue, profit, and earnings surpass expectations. CEO optimistic about growth strategy.

news.summary: Prestige Consumer Healthcare Inc. (NYSE:PBH) released its financial report for the fourth quarter and fiscal year ending on March 31, 2025, from Tarrytown, N.Y. The company highlighted key numbers in its performance during this period without disclosing specifics.
news.headline: Prestige Consumer Healthcare Inc. (NYSE: PBH) reports record fiscal 2025 revenue and earnings; financial results for Q4 and FY 2025.

news.summary: In New York, Melio, a prominent platform for accounts payable and receivable, has formed a partnership with Gusto, a trusted provider of payroll, HR, and benefits for over 400,000 small and mid-sized businesses. This collaboration aims to simplify payment processes for businesses by allowing them to pay employees, contractors, vendors, and receive invoice payments all within a single platform. Gusto joins a expanding group of financial institutions, SaaS providers, and e-commerce platforms that have opted to utilize Melio’s integrated accounts payable and receivable services.
news.headline: Melio teams up with Gusto for bill pay and invoicing, streamlining payments for businesses. Gusto serves 400,000 small to mid-sized companies.

news.summary: In the first quarter of 2025, Stratasys Ltd. (Nasdaq: SSYS), a leading company in polymer 3D printing solutions, shared its financial outcomes. CEO Dr. Yoav Zeif mentioned the positive performance, highlighting a net profit on an adjusted basis and favorable cash flow from operating activities. One notable achievement was the 7% sequential increase in recurring revenue from Consumables. This indicates sustained growth in this area for the company.
news.headline: Stratasys reports Q1 2025 financials; CEO highlights 7% growth in recurring revenue Consumables.

news.summary: Outpost24, a prominent cyber risk management and threat intelligence solutions provider, unveiled the addition of two fresh Digital Risk Protection (DRP) modules to its External Attack Surface Management (EASM) platform. The integration of the Social Media and Data Leakage modules complements the existing Leaked Credentials and Dark Web modules, strengthening customer visibility across the complete attack surface. These enhancements offer access to confidential sources and advanced automation, enriching the platform's capabilities for mitigating cyber threats.
news.headline: Outpost24 adds 2 new modules (Social Media, Data Leakage) to EASM platform, joining Leaked Credentials, Dark Web for enhanced cyber risk insights.

news.summary: SharkNinja, Inc. revealed its financial performance for the first quarter ending on March 31, 2025, showcasing significant growth compared to the same period in 2024. The company reported a notable 14.7% rise in net sales, amounting to $1,222.6 million. However, both gross margin and Adjusted Gross Margin experienced a decline of 10 and 60 basis points, respectively. On a positive note, net income saw a spike of 7.5%, reaching $117.8 million. These results demonstrate SharkNinja's strong financial standing and continued success in its market sector.
news.headline: SharkNinja reports Q1 2025 results: 14.7% increase in net sales ($1.2B), 7.5% increase in net income ($117.8M).

news.summary: D-Wave Quantum Inc., a prominent player in commercial quantum computing systems, software, and services, recently shared its financial performance for the first quarter concluding on March 31, 2025. The company, listed as NYSE: QBTS, had a remarkable first quarter according to Dr. Alan Baratz, the CEO. He expressed the quarter as possibly the most momentous in the Company's history, highlighting their exceptional capacity to provide quantum benefits to customers and the scientific realm.
news.headline: D-Wave (NYSE: QBTS) announces Q1 2025 results, CEO Dr. Alan Baratz describes it as significant for the company.

news.summary: Texas-based Oak Creek Homes has been acknowledged for their outstanding achievement in single section home design. The company, situated in League City, has recently received the top honor for Manufactured Home Design - Single Section at the 2025 Excellence in Manufactured Homes Awards. This recognition highlights the company's commitment to excellence in the industry. The award signifies Oak Creek Homes' continued success and dedication to innovative and quality design.
news.headline: Oak Creek Homes wins top award for Single Section Home Design at 2025 Manufactured Housing Awards.

news.summary: Altice USA (NYSE: ATUS) has released its first quarter results for the period ending March 31, 2025. According to Dennis Mathew, Altice USA's Chairman and CEO, the company has shown consistent advancement in its operational and financial objectives. In this quarter, Altice USA experienced exceptional customer growth in both its fiber and mobile segments. Additionally, the broadband subscriber performance showed positive momentum compared to the previous quarter. Altice USA also concluded two significant programming negotiations during this period.
news.headline: Altice USA (NYSE: ATUS) reports Q1 2025 results: Record customer growth in fiber and mobile, broadband subscriber performance improves.

news.summary: N-able, Inc., a global software company trading on NYSE under the symbol NABL, announced its financial results for the first quarter ending March 31, 2025. The company's CEO, John Pagliuca, highlighted the ongoing efforts to enhance cyber resiliency globally. Significant achievements in the quarter included the introduction of new security features, a substantial increase in channel partners within the Partner Program, and noteworthy growth in new business acquisitions. According to Pagliuca, these advances contributed to the company's positive earnings and consolidated its position in the cyber-security market.
news.headline: N-able reported Q1 2025 results, showing progress in cyber resiliency with new security capabilities and large partner additions.
